label: Stuff category
description: Classifies a material as a stuff category (metallic, woody, stony, fabric, leather, bioferrite) for use in buildable and recipe filters.

noun.label: Noun
noun.description: The noun used for this stuff category in grammar rules (e.g. "metal", "wood"). Translated.

destroySoundSmall.label: Destroy sound (small)
destroySoundSmall.description: Sound played when a small structure made of this stuff category is destroyed.

destroySoundMedium.label: Destroy sound (medium)
destroySoundMedium.description: Sound played when a medium structure made of this stuff category is destroyed.

destroySoundLarge.label: Destroy sound (large)
destroySoundLarge.description: Sound played when a large structure made of this stuff category is destroyed. Omitted on Fabric and Leathery.

new-stuff-category.label: New stuff category
new-stuff-category.description: Minimal stuff category with a label and noun.
